prompt: High-fidelity photograph of an elegant East Asian woman with long, dark, wavy hair, standing amidst a dense, vibrant hedge of pink and fuchsia flowering Loropetalum (fringe flower) shrubs. The background is a profusion of dark leaves and dense clusters of bright pink fringe flowers, which also frame the foreground with softly blurred petals (bokeh) creating a natural depth of field. The focus is sharp on the woman and the immediate flowers around her. The mood is pensive and natural. Capture the night in a disposable-camera aesthetic: harsh direct flash, unpredictable exposure, blown highlights, strong shadows, motion blur, tilted framing, grainy film texture, imperfect focus, and spontaneous candid timing. Shot should feel raw, real, unposed - sometimes chaotic, sometimes glamorous.
